esp32_network_client_connect_ip.tooltip: Connect to the specified IP address and port

esp32_network_client_connect_host.tooltip: Connect to the specified hostname and port

esp32_networkclientsecure_create.tooltip: Create a new NetworkClientSecure secure network client object

esp32_networkclientsecure_set_insecure.tooltip: Set to insecure mode and do not verify the certificate chain (for testing only)

esp32_networkclientsecure_set_ca_cert.tooltip: Set the root CA certificate used to authenticate the server

esp32_networkclientsecure_set_certificat.tooltip: Set up client certificate for mutual authentication

esp32_networkclientsecure_set_private_ke.tooltip: Set client private key for two-way authentication

esp32_networkclientsecure_set_psk.message0: Set PSK authentication of %1 Identity %2 Key %3

esp32_networkclientsecure_set_plain_star.message0: Set %1 to plain text startup mode
esp32_networkclientsecure_set_plain_star.tooltip: Set to plain text startup mode for protocol upgrades (such as STARTTLS)

esp32_networkclientsecure_start_tls.tooltip: Upgrade the plaintext connection to a TLS connection. Return 0 to indicate failure and non-zero to indicate success.

esp32_networkclientsecure_verify_fingerp.tooltip: Verify server certificate fingerprint and domain name

esp32_networkclientsecure_get_peer_finge.message0: Get the peer certificate fingerprint of %1
esp32_networkclientsecure_get_peer_finge.tooltip: Get the SHA256 fingerprint (hex string) of the peer certificate

esp32_networkclientsecure_last_error.tooltip: Get the error information of the last connection or operation

esp32_network_client_println.tooltip: Send data to server and add newlines

esp32_network_client_available.message0: Client %1 Number of data bytes that can be read
esp32_network_client_available.tooltip: Get the number of data bytes that can be read

esp32_network_client_connected.tooltip: Check if the client is connected

esp32_network_server_create.message0: Create web server %1 Port %2 Maximum number of connections %3

esp32_network_server_accept.tooltip: Accepts client connections and returns client objects

esp32_network_udp_begin.tooltip: Start listening for UDP packets on the specified port

esp32_network_udp_begin_packet.message0: UDP %1 starts sending packets to %2 port %3
esp32_network_udp_begin_packet.tooltip: Start preparing to send UDP packets

esp32_network_udp_parse_packet.message0: UDP %1 parses the received data packet
esp32_network_udp_parse_packet.tooltip: Parse the received UDP packet and return the packet size

esp32_network_udp_available.message0: UDP %1 Number of available data bytes
esp32_network_udp_available.tooltip: Get the number of data bytes that can be read

esp32_network_udp_remote_ip.tooltip: Get the remote IP address from which packets are sent

esp32_network_udp_remote_port.tooltip: Get the remote port for sending packets
